title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and server for running large language models locally (Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, etc.) with a simple pull/run workflow.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node.js and browsers; chat, generate, and stream completions.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package providing Ollama chat and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, OpenAI-compatible endpoints).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive TUI for Ollama written in Python; browse, chat, and manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for RAG pipelines.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama + Sentence-Transformers + FAISS to chat with local documents.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that streams responses from local Ollama models in chat channels.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that wraps Ollama for CI/CD pipelines: pull models, run prompts, generate code/docs.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-camunda
summary: Camunda 8 connector enabling BPMN service tasks to call local Ollama models for generative AI steps.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama for local LLM conversations with session memory.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language wrapper for Ollama API with synchronous and asynchronous procedures.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with Finch HTTP and GenServer streaming support.

title: ollama-rails
summary: Ruby gem providing ActiveModel-style interface to Ollama for Rails applications.
